title: zanthoxylum leiorhachium
intro: Zanthoxylum leiorhachium, also known as the Szechuan pepper tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China. It is a type of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in compounds that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. Zanthoxylum leiorhachium can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and its extracts are often used to treat digestive problems, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system.
